usd_reference.note: Seed data specifies total architecture fee of $300,000 USD. MXN figures above are at ~26 MXN/USD. Payment schedule per seed data uses USD.

assumptions: This is a preliminary estimate — label as such in all client communications
Cost per sqm source: market benchmark for commercial_hotel in Baja California Sur coastal zone — MXN 25,000–40,000/sqm mid-2026; using MXN 32,500 midpoint
architecture_fee = MXN 65,000,000 × 12% = MXN 7,800,000 (seed data specifies USD 300,000 — using USD in payment schedule)
Hydrologic study and retention basin (if required) not included in base estimate — cost impact TBD pending study results
Steep slope on west side may require additional civil/earthwork budget — flagged for engineering phase
